NationalRaspberryTartDay.haiku:
Ripe berries nestle,
Crimson jewels on soft cream,
Joyful bites awake.
Happy #NationalRaspberryTartDay from @ClamBakeSanta

NationalTwoDifferentColoredShoesDay.theme: National Two Different Colored Shoes Day

Happy #NationalTwoDifferentColoredShoesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

HappyBirthdayGoldaMeir.haiku:

Cake adorned with bright candles,
Joy wrapped in warm hugs.
#HappyBirthdayGoldaMeir from @ClamBakeSanta
